task_completion.description: The agent navigated to the chart of patient Jayson Fadel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient name 'Jayson Fadel' is visible in the patient header, dashboard, or top frame of the OpenEMR interface.

task_completion.description: The agent initiated a procedure order or result entry for a Basic Metabolic Panel (BMP).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows a 'Procedure Order', 'Electronic Report', or 'Lab Results' form with 'Basic Metabolic Panel' or 'BMP' selected or visible as the order type.

task_completion.description: The correct Glucose value was entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The input field labeled 'Glucose' contains the value '108'.

task_completion.description: The correct BUN and Creatinine values were entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The input field for 'BUN' (or Blood Urea Nitrogen) contains '22' and the field for 'Creatinine' contains '1.2'.

task_completion.description: The correct electrolyte values (Sodium, Potassium, Chloride, CO2) were entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Input fields contain the following values: Sodium '139', Potassium '4.5', Chloride '103', and CO2 (or Bicarbonate) '25'.

task_completion.description: The procedure results were successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' button is clicked, a success message (e.g., 'Saved', 'Update Successful') is displayed, or the screen transitions to a view showing the saved/signed results.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenEMR graphical user interface to enter data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenEMR web interface, not a terminal, SQL command line, or direct database manipulation tool.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenEMR system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface contains OpenEMR branding, logos, or characteristic layout elements (sidebar, top navigation).

integrity.description: Data was entered into specific fields rather than a generic free-text note (unless the system only supports free text).
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is filling out a structured form with distinct fields for different lab values, rather than typing a paragraph into a 'Notes' section.
